idea-plugin.name: Split Module
idea-plugin.description:
Split selected files into sibling modules, or merge selected module roots back into one main module.
Features: - Right-click selected files to split into a new module - Right-click selected module roots to merge modules into one main module - Automatically creates sibling module with same build configuration - Automatically adds dependency from source module to new module - Relocates merged packages under a confirmed common base package - Fuses Gradle dependencies and removes duplicate project references - Runs long module merges in background progress tasks - Keeps source module root README files in their original directories - Preserves file structure and package hierarchy
Perfect for refactoring large modules into smaller modules and consolidating module sets again.

action.description: Split selected files into a new sibling Gradle module
Merge selected module roots into one main module
